body:
## Working session summary

PR #175 is updated and ready for review: https://github.com/link-foundation/relative-meta-logic/pull/175

Committed and pushed:
`911526c Tighten pure-links truth-table fallback audit`

Key outcomes:
- Tightened pure-links strict mode so partial truth-table bindings retain a visible `truth-table-fallback` dependency and are rejected unless the table is total over the active strict carrier.
- Added parallel JS/Rust regression coverage for partial truth-table fallback rejection while keeping `boolean-links` accepted as fallback-free.
- Aligned `docs/FOUNDATIONS.md` and the issue-97 case study with the completed Phase 5/Phase 9 work and the new strict-mode truth-table contract.
- Updated the PR title/body with fresh test counts and marked the PR ready for review.

Verification:
- Local: `npm test` 1211/1211, `cargo test --all-targets` 815/815, playground, lint-English, parity, docs tests, and `git diff --check` all passed.
- GitHub Actions on `911526c`: api-docs, bootstrap, docker, lint-english, parity, JS, and Rust checks all passed; deploy skipped as expected.
- Working tree is clean.
